GetListing.name: GetListing
GetListing.documentation: Provides details about a listing, such as descriptions, badges, categories, pricing model summaries, reviews, and associated products and offers.

GetOffer.name: GetOffer
GetOffer.documentation: Provides details about an offer, such as the pricing model, seller of record, availability dates, badges, and associated products.

GetOfferSet.name: GetOfferSet
GetOfferSet.documentation: Provides details about an offer set, which is a bundle of offers across multiple products. Includes the seller, availability dates, buyer notes, and associated product-offer pairs.

GetOfferTerms.name: GetOfferTerms
GetOfferTerms.documentation: Returns the terms attached to an offer, such as pricing terms (usage-based, contract, BYOL, free trial), legal terms, payment schedules, validity terms, support terms, and renewal terms.

GetProduct.name: GetProduct
GetProduct.documentation: Provides details about a product, such as descriptions, highlights, categories, fulfillment option summaries, promotional media, and seller engagement options.

ListFulfillmentOptions.name: ListFulfillmentOptions
ListFulfillmentOptions.documentation: Returns the fulfillment options available for a product, including deployment details such as version information, operating systems, usage instructions, and release notes.

ListPurchaseOptions.name: ListPurchaseOptions
ListPurchaseOptions.documentation:
Returns the purchase options (offers and offer sets) available to the buyer. You can filter results by product, seller, purchase option type, visibility scope, and availability status.

You must include at least one of the following filters in the request: a PRODUCT_ID filter to specify the product for which to retrieve purchase options, or a VISIBILITY_SCOPE filter to retrieve purchase options by visibility.

SearchFacets.name: SearchFacets
SearchFacets.documentation: Returns available facet values for filtering listings, such as categories, pricing models, fulfillment option types, publishers, and customer ratings. Each facet value includes a count of matching listings.

SearchListings.name: SearchListings
SearchListings.documentation: Returns a list of product listings based on search criteria and filters. You can search by keyword, filter by category, pricing model, fulfillment type, and other attributes, and sort results by relevance or customer rating.

AccessDeniedException.documentation: You don't have sufficient access to perform this action.

FulfillmentOption.documentation: Describes a fulfillment option for a product. Each element contains exactly one fulfillment option type.

fulfillmentOptionType.documentation: The machine-readable type of the fulfillment option, such as SAAS or AMAZON_MACHINE_IMAGE.

displayName.documentation: The human-readable name of the fulfillment option type.

FulfillmentOptionSummary.documentation: A summary of a fulfillment option available for deploying or accessing a listing or product.

listingId.documentation: The unique identifier of the listing to retrieve.

associatedEntities.documentation: The products and offers associated with this listing. Each entity contains product and offer information.

badges.documentation: Badges indicating special attributes of the listing, such as free tier eligibility, free trial availability, or Quick Launch support.

catalog.documentation: The name of the catalog that the listing belongs to.

categories.documentation: The categories used to classify this listing into logical groups.

fulfillmentOptionSummaries.documentation: A summary of fulfillment options available for deploying or accessing the listing, such as AMI, SaaS, or Container.

highlights.documentation: A list of key features that the listing offers to customers.

integrationGuide.documentation: Optional guidance explaining how to use data in this listing. Primarily defines how to integrate with a multi-product listing.

listingName.documentation: The human-readable display name of the listing.

logoThumbnailUrl.documentation: The URL of the logo thumbnail image for the listing.

longDescription.documentation: A detailed description of what the listing offers, in paragraph format.

pricingModels.documentation: The pricing models for offers associated with this listing, such as usage-based, contract, BYOL, or free.

pricingUnits.documentation: The pricing units that define the billing dimensions for offers associated with this listing, such as users, hosts, or data.

promotionalMedia.documentation: Embedded promotional media provided by the creator of the product, such as images and videos.

publisher.documentation: The entity who created and published the listing.

resources.documentation: Resources that provide further information about using the product or requesting support, such as documentation links, support contacts, and usage instructions.

reviewSummary.documentation: A summary of customer reviews available for the listing, including average rating and total review count by source.

sellerEngagements.documentation: Engagement options available to potential buyers, such as requesting a private offer or requesting a demo.

shortDescription.documentation: A 1–3 sentence summary describing the key aspects of the listing.

useCases.documentation: Use cases associated with the listing, describing scenarios where the product can be applied.

offerId.documentation: The unique identifier of the offer to retrieve.

catalog.documentation: The name of the catalog that the offer belongs to.

offerName.documentation: The display name of the offer. This is free-form text provided by the seller.

availableFromTime.documentation: The date and time when the offer became available to the buyer.

sellerOfRecord.documentation: The entity responsible for selling the product under this offer.

replacementAgreementId.documentation: The identifier of the existing agreement that this offer would replace. Enables agreement-based offer functionality.

pricingModel.documentation: The pricing model that determines how buyers are charged, such as usage-based, contract, BYOL, or free.

badges.documentation: Badges indicating special attributes of the offer, such as private pricing, future dated, or replacement offer.

associatedEntities.documentation: The products and offer sets associated with this offer.

offerSetId.documentation: The unique identifier of the offer set to retrieve.

maxResults.documentation: The maximum number of results that are returned per call. You can use nextToken to get more results.

product.documentation: Information about the product associated with the offer.

offerSet.documentation: Information about the offer set, if the offer is part of a bundled offer set.

offerSetId.documentation: The unique identifier of the offer set.

sellerOfRecord.documentation: The entity responsible for selling the products under this offer set.

OfferTerm.documentation: A term attached to an offer. Each element contains exactly one term type, such as a pricing term, legal term, or payment schedule term.

currencyCode.documentation: Defines the currency for the prices in this term.

schedule.documentation: The payment schedule installments, each with a charge date and amount.

PaymentScheduleTerm.documentation: Defines a payment schedule term with installment payments at specified dates.

pricingModelType.documentation: The machine-readable type of the pricing model.

displayName.documentation: The human-readable name of the pricing model.

PricingModel.documentation: A pricing model that determines how buyers are charged for a listing, such as usage-based, contract, BYOL, or free.

pricingUnitType.documentation: The machine-readable type of the pricing unit.

displayName.documentation: The human-readable name of the pricing unit.

PricingUnit.documentation: A pricing unit that defines the billing dimension for a listing, such as users, hosts, bandwidth, or data.

productName.documentation: The human-readable display name of the product.

fulfillmentOptionDisplayName.documentation: A human-readable name for the fulfillment option type.

title.documentation: The title displayed when hovering over the image.

PromotionalEmbeddedImage.documentation: An embedded promotional image for a product.

title.documentation: The title displayed when hovering over the video.

preview.documentation: The URL of the high-resolution preview image for the video.

thumbnail.documentation: The URL of the thumbnail image for the video.

PromotionalEmbeddedVideo.documentation: An embedded promotional video for a product.

PromotionalMedia.documentation: Embedded promotional media for a product, such as images or videos. Each element contains exactly one media type.

product.documentation: Information about the product associated with the purchase option.

offer.documentation: Information about the offer associated with the purchase option.

offerSet.documentation: Information about the offer set, if the purchase option is part of a bundled offer set.

PurchaseOptionAssociatedEntity.documentation: A product, offer, and optional offer set associated with a purchase option.

PurchaseOptionBadge.documentation: A badge indicating a special attribute of a purchase option, such as private pricing or future dated.

filterType.documentation: The type of filter to apply, such as PRODUCT_ID, VISIBILITY_SCOPE, or PURCHASE_OPTION_TYPE.

filterValues.documentation: The values to filter by. Multiple values within the same filter are combined with OR logic.

PurchaseOptionFilter.documentation: A filter used to narrow purchase option results by product, seller, type, visibility, or availability.

purchaseOptionId.documentation: The unique identifier of the purchase option.

catalog.documentation: The name of the catalog that the purchase option belongs to.

purchaseOptionType.documentation: The type of purchase option. Values are OFFER for a single-product offer or OFFERSET for a bundled offer set.

purchaseOptionName.documentation: The display name of the purchase option.

availableFromTime.documentation: The date and time when the purchase option became available to the buyer.

expirationTime.documentation: The date and time when the purchase option expires and is no longer available for procurement.

sellerOfRecord.documentation: The entity responsible for selling the product under this purchase option.

badges.documentation: Badges indicating special attributes of the purchase option, such as private pricing or future dated.

associatedEntities.documentation: The products, offers, and offer sets associated with this purchase option.

PurchaseOptionSummary.documentation: Summary information about a purchase option (offer or offer set) available to the buyer, including the seller, badges, and associated products.

dimensionKey.documentation: The machine-readable key identifying the dimension being priced.

description.documentation: A description of the dimension being priced.

dimensionLabels.documentation: Labels used to categorize this dimension, such as by region.

unit.documentation: The unit of measurement for the dimension.

price.documentation: The price per unit for the dimension.

RateCardItem.documentation: A per-unit rate within a rate card, defining the price for a specific dimension.

currencyCode.documentation: Defines the currency for the prices in this term.

RecurringPaymentTerm.documentation: Defines a recurring payment term with fixed charges at regular billing intervals.

RenewalTerm.documentation: Defines a renewal term that enables automatic agreement renewal.

resourceType.documentation: The category of the resource, such as manufacturer support or usage instructions.

contentType.documentation: The format of the resource content, such as a URL, email address, or text.

value.documentation: The resource content. Interpretation depends on the content type.

displayName.documentation: An optional human-readable label for the resource.

Resource.documentation: A resource that provides supplementary information about a product, such as documentation links, support contacts, or usage instructions.

sourceName.documentation: The name of the review source, such as AWS Marketplace.

sourceId.documentation: The machine-readable identifier of the review source.

sourceUrl.documentation: The URL where the reviews can be accessed at the source.

averageRating.documentation: The average rating across all reviews from this source.

totalReviews.documentation: The total number of reviews available from this source.

ReviewSourceSummary.documentation: A review summary from a specific source, including the average rating and total review count.

reviewSourceSummaries.documentation: Review summaries from different sources, such as AWS Marketplace.

ReviewSummary.documentation: A summary of customer reviews available for a listing, aggregated by review source.

fulfillmentOptionDisplayName.documentation: A human-readable name for the fulfillment option type.

fulfillmentUrl.documentation: The URL of the seller's software registration landing page.

usageInstructions.documentation: Instructions on how to access and use this SaaS product.

releaseNotes.documentation: Release notes describing changes in this version of the fulfillment option.

usageInstructions.documentation: Instructions on how to use this SageMaker algorithm.

recommendation.documentation: Recommended instance types for training and inference with this algorithm.

recommendedRealtimeInferenceInstanceType.documentation: The recommended instance type for real-time inference.

fulfillmentOptionDisplayName.documentation: A human-readable name for the fulfillment option type.

recommendation.documentation: Recommended instance types for inference with this model.

recommendedRealtimeInferenceInstanceType.documentation: The recommended instance type for real-time inference.

SageMakerModelRecommendation.documentation: Recommended instance types for inference with a SageMaker model.

chargeDate.documentation: The date when the payment is due.

chargeAmount.documentation: The amount to be charged on the charge date.

ScheduleItem.documentation: A payment installment within a payment schedule term.

searchText.documentation: The search query text to filter listings before retrieving facets.

filters.documentation: Filters to apply before retrieving facets. Multiple filters are combined with AND logic. Multiple values within the same filter are combined with OR logic.

facetTypes.documentation: A list of specific facet types to retrieve. If empty or null, all available facets are returned.

nextToken.documentation: If nextToken is returned, there are more results available. Make the call again using the returned token to retrieve the next page.

totalResults.documentation: The total number of listings matching the search criteria.

listingFacets.documentation: A map of facet types to their corresponding facet values. Each facet value includes a display name, internal value, and count of matching listings.

nextToken.documentation: If nextToken is returned, there are more results available. Make the call again using the returned token to retrieve the next page.

filterValues.documentation: The values to filter by. Term filters accept multiple values (OR logic). Range filters (MIN/MAX_AVERAGE_CUSTOMER_RATING) accept a single value between 0.0 and 5.0.

SearchFilter.documentation: A filter used to narrow search results by attribute, such as category, pricing model, or fulfillment type.

searchText.documentation: The search query text to find relevant listings.

filters.documentation: Filters to narrow search results. Multiple filters are combined with AND logic. Multiple values within the same filter are combined with OR logic.

maxResults.documentation: The maximum number of results that are returned per call. You can use nextToken to get more results.

sortBy.documentation: The field to sort results by. Valid values are RELEVANCE and AVERAGE_CUSTOMER_RATING.

sortOrder.documentation: The sort direction. Valid values are DESCENDING and ASCENDING.

nextToken.documentation: If nextToken is returned, there are more results available. Make the call again using the returned token to retrieve the next page.

totalResults.documentation: The total number of listings matching the search criteria.

listingSummaries.documentation: The listing summaries matching the search criteria. Each summary includes the listing name, description, badges, categories, pricing models, reviews, and associated products.

nextToken.documentation: If nextToken is returned, there are more results available. Make the call again using the returned token to retrieve the next page.

type.documentation: The category of the selector, such as Duration.

Selector.documentation: A selector used to choose a specific configuration within a configurable upfront rate card.

engagementType.documentation: The type of engagement, such as REQUEST_FOR_PRIVATE_OFFER or REQUEST_FOR_DEMO.

contentType.documentation: The format of the engagement value, such as a URL.

value.documentation: The engagement value, such as a URL to the engagement form.

SellerEngagement.documentation: An engagement option available to potential buyers of a product, such as requesting a private offer or a demo.

sellerProfileId.documentation: The unique identifier of the seller profile.

SellerInformation.documentation: Information about a seller, including the profile identifier and display name.

refundPolicy.documentation: The refund policy description for the offer.

SupportTerm.documentation: Defines a support term that includes the refund policy for the offer.

ThrottlingException.documentation: The request was denied due to request throttling.

currencyCode.documentation: Defines the currency for the prices in this term.

rateCards.documentation: The rate cards containing per-unit rates for usage-based pricing.

UsageBasedPricingTerm.documentation: Defines a usage-based pricing term (typically pay-as-you-go), where buyers are charged based on product usage.

rateCard.documentation: The per-unit rates for this usage-based rate card.

UsageBasedRateCardItem.documentation: A rate card within a usage-based pricing term, containing per-unit rates.

displayName.documentation: The human-readable name of the use case.

value.documentation: The machine-readable identifier of the use case.

UseCase.documentation: A use case describing a scenario where the product can be applied.

UseCaseEntry.documentation: An entry in the list of use cases for a listing.

reason.documentation: The reason that the input fails to satisfy the constraints specified by the service.

ValidationException.documentation: The input fails to satisfy the constraints specified by the service.

agreementDuration.documentation: The duration of the agreement, in ISO 8601 format.

ValidityTerm.documentation: Defines a validity term that specifies the duration or date range of an agreement.

currencyCode.documentation: Defines the currency for the prices in this term.

maxTotalChargeAmount.documentation: The maximum total amount that can be charged under this term.

VariablePaymentTerm.documentation: Defines a variable payment term with a maximum total charge amount.

documentation: The AWS Marketplace Discovery API provides programmatic access to the AWS Marketplace catalog, including searching and browsing listings, retrieving product details and fulfillment options, and accessing public and private offer pricing and terms.
